# LoopGate JS

LoopGate JS, also known as loopgate_js, is a TypeScript and Vite frontend
coding-agent loop harness for Claude, Codex, Copilot, Agy, and other CLI
agents.

It provides a repo-native workflow where prompts, specs, project status, tests,
and gate checks live with the code. Agents can run fresh-context iterations,
edit frontend code, and commit only after passing guardrails such as ESLint,
Stylelint, HTML validation, strict TypeScript, Vitest coverage, Playwright,
Lighthouse, dependency checks, security checks, and containment rules.

Repository: https://github.com/rxdt/loopgate_js
Sample app: https://vram.rxdt.dev/
Sample app source: https://github.com/rxdt/ai_deployment_calculator
